title: malvaviscus coccineus
intro: Malvaviscus coccineus, also known as the turkey-tail or sabadilla, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Malvaviscus coccineus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Malvaviscus coccineus can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
